de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITermTacletAppIndexCache

    public abstract class PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl
extends java.lang.Object
    The abstract superclass of caches for taclet app indexes that are implemented using a common backend LRUCache (the backend is stored in TermTacletAppIndexCacheSet). The backend is accessed in a way that guarantees that two distinct instances of this class never interfere, by choosing cache keys that are specific for a particular instance of PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl and cannot be created by other instances. This ensures that it is safe to use one instance of LRUCache for many instances of PrefixTermTacletAppIndexCacheImpl (different proofs, different proof branches, different locations).
